slices.title: Add action buttons to mobile bottom navigation mockup
slices.jtbd: When using the mobile view, I want to see create, edit, and delete actions in the bottom navigation, so that I can quickly modify records without relying only on search.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the mockup at design/approved/20260721003552-mockup/mockup.html, When the mobile layout is rendered, Then the bottom navigation bar must visually include create, edit, and delete actions.
Given the updated mobile navigation bar, When viewed on a mobile device, Then the layout must fit all action buttons without breaking or horizontal overflow.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: reduce average clicks to reach CRUD actions from 3 to 1
